title: ficus triloba subsp. quangtriensis
intro: Ficus triloba subsp. quangtriensis is a subspecies of Ficus triloba, a type of fig tree native to Vietnam, characterized by its unique trilobed leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Vietnamese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ficus triloba subsp. quangtriensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and combat infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
